name: ClickUp
description: All-in-one productivity platform. Manage tasks, lists, spaces, and teams with powerful customization and automation features.
author: OpenJiuwen
desc_mk: ClickUp is an all-in-one productivity platform that brings tasks, docs, goals, and chat into one place. Use this plugin to manage workspaces, spaces, lists, and tasks. **Note:** Get your personal API token at [ClickUp Settings](https://app.clickup.com/settings/apps) under the Apps section.

Authorization.description: ClickUp personal API token (Environment variable: CLICKUP_API_KEY)

tools.name: Get Authorized User
tools.description: Return the details of the authenticated ClickUp user

tools.name: Get Teams (Workspaces)
tools.description: Return all Workspaces (Teams) accessible to the authenticated user

tools.name: Get Spaces
tools.description: Return all Spaces in a given Workspace (Team)

team_id.description: The ID of the Team (Workspace) to get Spaces from

archived.description: Include archived Spaces in the results

tools.name: Get Lists
tools.description: Return all Lists in a given Space

space_id.description: The ID of the Space to get Lists from

archived.description: Include archived Lists in the results

tools.name: Get Tasks
tools.description: Return all Tasks in a given List with optional filtering

list_id.description: The ID of the List to get Tasks from

order_by.description: Field to order results by: id, created, updated, or due_date

statuses.description: Comma-separated list of statuses to filter by

assignees.description: Comma-separated list of assignee user IDs to filter by

due_date_gt.description: Filter tasks with due date greater than this Unix timestamp (milliseconds)

due_date_lt.description: Filter tasks with due date less than this Unix timestamp (milliseconds)

tools.name: Get Task
tools.description: Return the details of a single ClickUp task

task_id.description: The ID of the task to retrieve

custom_task_ids.description: Set to true if using custom task IDs instead of ClickUp IDs

team_id.description: Workspace ID (required when custom_task_ids is true)

tools.name: Create Task
tools.description: Create a new task in a ClickUp list

list_id.description: The ID of the List to create the task in

description.description: Plain text description of the task

assignees.description: Array of user IDs to assign to this task

tags.description: Array of tag names to apply to the task

status.description: Status of the task (must match an existing status in the List)

due_date.description: Due date as Unix timestamp in milliseconds

due_date_time.description: Set to true if the due_date includes a specific time

start_date.description: Start date as Unix timestamp in milliseconds

notify_all.description: Notify all assignees of the task creation

parent.description: Task ID of the parent task to create this as a subtask

links_to.description: Task ID to link this task to

check_required_custom_fields.description: Validate required custom fields before creating the task

tools.name: Update Task
tools.description: Update an existing ClickUp task's properties

task_id.description: The ID of the task to update

description.description: New plain text description for the task

due_date.description: New due date as Unix timestamp in milliseconds

assignees.description: Object with add/rem arrays of user IDs. Example: {"add": [123], "rem": [456]}

task_id.description: The ID of the task to delete

tools.name: Get Task Comments
tools.description: Return all comments on a ClickUp task

task_id.description: The ID of the task to get comments for
